samples.gvd:
module pe(
    input clk, 
    input rst, 
    input [31:0] a, 
    input [31:0] b, 
    output reg [31:0] c
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            c <= 32'd0;
        end else begin
            c <= c + (a * b);
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pe">
    <description>Parallel Multiplier-Accumulator (MAC) PE</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal. Active-high for reset.</input>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="c" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the accumulated result.</output>
    </ports>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="c" width="32" reset_value="0" update_on_rising_edge_of_clk="true" update_condition="!rst" update_expression="c + (a * b)" />
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Multiplies inputs a and b, accumulating the result in register c on each clock cycle, resetting to zero if rst is asserted.</implementation>
</module>
